title: Camouflage Doors and Trapdoor
description: Doors and Trapdoors that camouflages with vanilla blocks
body:
## Mod Overview 🌟

This mod introduces a variety of camouflage doors and trapdoors designed to seamlessly blend with vanilla Minecraft textures. Players can utilize these custom doors to create hidden entrances, enhancing their gameplay experience by adding an element of stealth and surprise. 🏰🔒

## Key Features 🛠️

- **Custom Camouflage**: The mod includes doors and trapdoors that mimic the textures of various vanilla blocks, allowing players to create entrances that are indistinguishable from their surroundings. 🌿

- **Variety of Blocks**: Currently, the mod supports a wide range of blocks, including but not limited to:
  - Quartz 🪨
  - Cobblestone 🧱
  - Wood Planks 🌳
  - Stone ⛰️
  - And many more! 🎉

- **Crafting System**: The camouflage doors and trapdoors are crafted using the standard crafting table, following the same patterns as vanilla doors and trapdoors, but with the added benefit of camouflage. ⚒️

- **User-Friendly Mechanics**: The doors and trapdoors function just like standard doors in Minecraft. Players can open and close them with a simple right-click, making them easy to use in any build. 🚪

- **Creative Mode Only**: Due to the limited availability of craftable doors and trapdoors in vanilla Minecraft, this mod is designed to be used in creative mode only. Most of the camouflage doors and trapdoors cannot be obtained through survival mode gameplay. 🎮

## Why Download This Mod? 🤔

- **Enhanced Stealth**: Perfect for players who enjoy building secret bases or hidden rooms, this mod allows for creative architectural designs without sacrificing functionality. 🕵️‍♂️

- **Community Engagement**: The mod encourages community interaction by inviting users to suggest additional blocks for future updates. This ensures the mod evolves based on player feedback and needs. 💬

- **Compatibility**: Designed specifically for Minecraft version 1.20.1, this mod integrates smoothly with existing gameplay, ensuring a seamless experience. ✅

## Conclusion 🎊

This camouflage doors and trapdoors mod not only expands the aesthetic possibilities within Minecraft but also enhances gameplay by allowing for creative hiding spots. Whether for practical use in creative mode or for fun in builds, this mod is a must-have for any Minecraft enthusiast looking to add a layer of intrigue to their creations! 🏗️✨
